subcodes.first_line: O thou humble and lowly servant of the Blessed Beauty! Though thou art but a tender sapling in the garden of love of the Lord of Oneness, yet through His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبد صغیر فقیر جمال مبارک اگرچه نهال تازه گلشن محبت حضرت احدیتی لکن از فضل
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul
